author: @labster1582
text: Не чел так ты далеко не уедешь в этой игре. Не разбираешься механниках и тупо играешь на автобое, а в этой игре нужно реально думать как играть и в каком порядке разыгрывать карты и как механники работают впринципе. Даже с супер прокачеными персами с идеально собраной тимой на автобое выигрывать вринципе невозможно эндгейм уровни.

author: @PS.Starve
text:
Тайм коды:
00:00 — Вступление
00:47 — Событие Саи: как получить бесплатную копию персонажа
01:21 — Суммарные награды ивента (250 круток) и краткий обзор активностей.
01:40 — Немного о сюжете и отсылках к новелле.
01:59 — Разбор Саи: личный опыт призыва (3 консты за 250 круток).
02:29 — Механика персонажа в бою: изменение Царства Кара, лечение и усиление урона.
03:00 — Что такое «Пернатое семя» и как работает копирование карт ультой.
03:42 — Коррозия: детальный разбор статуса, дополнительный урон и взаимодействие с ядом/кровотечением.
05:39 — Расчеты урона: как множится активный урон (включая щупальца) через коррозию.
08:08 — Итоги: стоит ли выбивать Саю и заключение.

author: @Viori726
text:
LYRICS!!! 


May you hear me call,  even as my shadows fades into thin air
Will you hear me call, call your name into the void, for you
Can you hear me call, holding on the floating sand, falling from my hands
Even if forgotten, I'm still here

Dandelion drifting flow, wandering all alone, caught in undertow, nowhere I could go
Wings floating snow, writhing they would go, warping stars untold, in darkness that enfolds
Petals falling down, all we ever hold, one drop of love so pure and so true, only one reason why seed will grow
Tears and petals know, searching all alone in the world below, that sound won't let go

(🎼) 

Inhale silence shards, the purest sound of voice begins to crack
Old dreams, memories ripe, they're rotted sweet, the blood runs cold and black
Keep on echoes clash, through the cracking gaps, breaking mashing overlap
Just meant to forget it, let it go, I will feel what must be known

Like drifting petals gone, all upon a journey fading to grey
Shadows melting slow, bey

text:
These losers play that way because they spend more time bashing you on discord than playing the actual game. They don't wanna know what is actually good they just want the reverse of your info, lmao...

This community is kind of like the inverse of PoE community. In PoE the community banded together at times against misleading content made by inexperienced players/tourists aimed at newer players but the difference there is you don't brick a whole account by following the info you just damage your progress for 1 season playing a shit build. It's kind of funny that in Morimens the shit players are in a clique and they control what info is out there and what resources people can use.

author: @KurenaiAki-KA
text:
Imo you should add Arachne as a Dmg Amp too since she has it on her ult.

Also...yeah I hate Clem too, when I started the game I had no idea what I was doing obviously so I went by vibes and I really do regret getting her...
Maybe she'd be a little better with some discard but a problem with it is she has no way of making certain her card ends up on top to be drawn quickly again (like Corpo), the effect of it isn't really mindblowing considering other characters generate a ton of Keyflare as well with extra effects and her being Ultra does her no favors because somehow she demands her cards being used first but even in her own realm there's plenty of other cards you'd prefer using first instead of hers.

She needs a damn rework top to bottom, maybe lean more into her insectoid traits since rn she shows off mostly her therapist side. Idk, maybe implanting larvae onto the enemies and her exalt popping them off to deal a load of pierce damage, drain HP, provide team Aliemus, Arithmetica r

author: @Rockgamer823
text:
Started playing 10 days ago because of the collab, I'll give my honest review as someone whose only other gacha game has been Blue Archive which I started playing for the same reason (collab with Toaru). 
I think Morimens excels in it's story and gameplay, the game's systems are complete and it's really fulfilling to play once you learn different mechanics from lots of characters. 
The bgm is good, not my favourite but fits the story to a glove, only thing I find a bit annoying is that so many of the bgms start the same way (specially the battle bgms), and when going into your home menu you can't use those bgms because it gets stale so quickly, but I guess that a problem with every gacha game.
If I had one serious criticism about this game is how it's hard to enjoy story and it's gameplay simultaneously, while playing the normal campaign of the game, I'd get so invested in the story but right after I'd have to do a 15 minute exploration to keep reading and that would break my inmers

author: @garlicma5665
text:
This PV really recalled me back to the days when I listened to Kuroi Uta. That time I went across Emi's ver then searched for Eir's ver. Both have similar, yet distinctive colors in each arrangement, that I had to searched for the mashup ver to see how it'd go (no doubt became my peak favorite one).
Now this, Emi and Kaneko in their own language. Even with that, I still have high hopes for the mashup ver of these vocalists to blend into such pleasant melodies when they release the full song.
Ok yapping enough I'm downloading this 🗣️

author: @albertoluis1544
text:
" You know the dandelion flower? The one that scatters its seeds on the wind?

The wind carries those fluffy seeds far, far from where they were born. What if one of them ends up in a desert where not even a single blade of grass is growing? If you can imagine how that lone seed will feel... then you might be able to understand me.

That seed is still a baby flower. If it does its best, it can turn even a desert into a garden.

Maybe that little seed will decide to thrive. Maybe it will decide to grow and multiply, so that it can turn the whole desert into a field of dandelions.

What do you think can give it the strength to do so?

All it needs... is to be loved by just one person in the whole desert. All it needs is to be told how pretty dandelions are."

- Saya

author: @juakored
text:
It's really good that they're giving people a free copy of her no matter what, but having to wait and go through so much content in order to get her or even know if she's gonna be worth the effort, just so that they can artificially keep player numbers up even so slightly for a bit longer is kinda shitty. 

Just think about it from a standard Gacha collab experience. 

- You've never played X game. 

- They make a Collab with Y which is more popular than X.

- You give players some shitty character for free (that's where this game is above average, but it's also not like there's many characters they could've given away with this Collab either).

- you give players some incentive to stay (250 pulls is what I've heard they're going with).

*now's where the issues begin.*

-  There's no banner yet... I don't think I've ever seen that before on any of the gachas I've played...

- you can't test the character beforehand to even see if she's gonna be worth staying for, if they did her justic
video_title: How to get Saya for FREE in Morimens

author: @xraeii
text:
Your other channel's video is the only video ever to make me get a game on the spot; not to mention, a gacha, and I genuinely thank you for it. I have 6 gacha games downloaded, all from industry giants (hoyo/fgo/ak), not counting the 5+ deleted or many others just skipped...and while I don't exactly maintain the accounts consistently; I meant to say that no narration has ever hooked my attention that hard. 

Like, even though I had a crash login issue that persisted for 48 hours that barred me from starting the game instantly, the customer support was very helpful and the new patch quickly solved my issue. Usually I would just not stick around, like when PGR had data issues, I just gave up on it...but this game's thematic core values; be it in-game or development wise, straight up just checked all boxes I could ever want from a live-service game.

While the game's gameplay mechanics and intricacies can certainly feel hella confusing; the community is very welcoming and they have very i

text:
So something to add about Hameln. Rousing Hameln is really required as s it gives you Symphonies. 

Symphonies is 0 cost card that makes it so that the next card played has -2 cost or +2 cost but double plays. This is Hameln's role and why people rate Hameln highly. He would still be B tier for this banner as his rerun banner is just after this one.

Another thing to add about Corposant. Her card is really not useful and is only for her. As a unit Corpo is good but as this banner is wheel + unit her tier should fall down to C.(Atleast in my opinion).

text:
「忘却の彼方」

聞こえますか　風に姿が溶けても
聞こえますか　あなたを探した
聞こえますか　零れる砂を掬って
忘れても　ずっと

花は散り　行く先を失った迷子のよう
花は散り　異形となる　星々を包み込んで
花は散り　かけがえない一滴の愛だけが芽吹く理由
涙と花は散り　落涙に残された声辿る

沈黙は　無垢な音に手折られた
想い出は　熟れすぎて腐敗した
絶え間なく　混ざってく記憶たち
忘れてもいい　必ず分かる

散った花は　二度と還らない旅へ
忘却の彼方　解けてく姿
呼ばれてる　だから還らない旅へ
彷徨って巡る　幻

（May I call your name, though the world all fades）
la la la la la . . . .
一滴の愛だけが

（May I call your name, though the world all fades）
この旅の理由

author: @SleepyGuppy
text:
Some things to note: Salvador isn't the father of all, more a priest of the father of all for that matter.

As for what you do with him in a team, most things are covered in the video like in the past few videos, so good, but there's quite a few more things that you would want to do with him.

1st, Birth of a Soul, a BP WoD that grants Max HP +10%, The Healing and Shield provided by the wielder increase by 10%, both of these effects "After playing the wielder's "Strike", restore 6% of lost HP. After playing the wielder's "Defense"' gain Shield equal to 6% of current life. This effect can trigger up to 1 time each per turn." which is perfect for any team with Salvador, so it's worth looking it up to if you are decided to use him in a team and have some cash to spare.

2nd and more budget, Horla (E1 at minimum), mainly in Grief stance "All Awakeners' Shield Generated, HP Recovery, and STR Reduction effect +21%. Increase the HP Recovery of Resplendent Chapters." so that you gain more Crim
video_title: Salvador: He Who Protects #morimens

author: @GunAndSwordGame
text:
Lại rơi rớt thông tin 😭Mình bổ sung ở đây nhá
1, Corrosions là hiệu ứng scale theo chỉ số STR của Saya, stack như một status bình thường. Khi được kích hoạt bằng đòn đánh hoặc xúc tu, nó sẽ tự tiêu thụ lượng stack tương đương với sát thương gây ra để gây x3 lượng dam kích hoạt đấy
Corrosions của Saya chỉ là một yếu tố bổ trợ, trong khi Castor mới là Carry Corrosion đích thực, nên Wheel/Trấn/Vũ khí của Saya mới tối ưu nhất khi đi cùng Castor
2, Nếu ai vẫn có điều kiện đầu tư, thì điểm dừng phù hợp là E1 hoặc E3 (2/4 copy), và không nên OE (8 copy để mở ulti 2) vì tích vòng ulti đầu đã sẵn mệt nghỉ rồi 🥵

次回の動画では、沙耶さんを編成した対人戦動画になります！

author: @AIcon1442
text:
Maybe I not accepted first song Maya, but this so beautiful. I love same… type of songs, characters and etc. 

Characters who try to be a beacon of hope for others, struggling with their own decay and not focusing on it, allowing only themselves to participate in this war. They put off the inevitable, leaving life early to avoid a more terrible fate, and ultimately sacrificing themselves for others. To take their nightmares to the grave. A beautiful aesthetic. It's a shame I'm too selfish to emulate this archetype. Although, perhaps they almost always exist only in an unreal reality...

author: @鮎木佐彩子
text:
【銀の鍵】

原作では出番らしい出番は無かったけれども、こうして沙耶の手の内にある事が嬉しくてたまらない。

虚淵玄氏がスランプだかの状態でこんなのは受けないだろうと生み出しながらも、その実沙耶の唄は大いに受けにウケた。
元ネタが火の鳥であろうとも、其処にクトゥルフ神話が合わさればさらなる物語り紡ぎ出す(無論悲劇も)

私達、【沙耶の唄】を求める者達にとって、今回の2026.5/31から始まったコラボレーションは本当に“広大な砂漠=流れた月日”　を歩んで出会えたオアシスに等しいです。

いとうかなこさんの新たなる歌

PV

そして……このドラマと本当に、こんなに嬉しいことはない！！
video_title: 【忘却前夜 × 沙耶の唄】コラボラジオドラマ「使者」

author: @AliceQuitter
text:
I'm sorry for your loss. Thanks for getting the guide out ASAP in spite of that. You've saved so many of us from wasting pulls on a gassed-up mid with a clunky kit.

The bar was on the ground. All she had to do was provide a better alternative to running Alva on a Mouchette comp. We weren't asking her to support Mouchette better than Faint; we weren't even asking her to do better than Helot or Lotan. We just wanted her to be better than Alva, and she couldn't even achieve that.

author: @DarkCT
text:
Can't say im surprised this is the conclusion you came too. Clunky is what she is. a rouse that obscures your own cards assuming you even give up the resources to access it. Corrosion that despite the rarity of the mechanic it crosses into a discard draw function when many teams are hand sculpting. Divine caro editing the tone of her embryo gen and functionality, causing her potential tempo issues in her element. she reads niche at best, and if anything a flavorful but troublesome character to play. not a great basis for a collab on pure mechanics. her discard draw can't even remove your entire hand, so you can't use it to pitch away symptons or states even. 

it's a shame in my eyes. I constantly credit the dev team for the thematic nature of their collabs, but this was 3 for 3 of me being here for a character release and not being excited about the mechanics at play. she still has her uses, but it all comes with strings attached.

author: @kingflares2
text:
Was a bit slow on this, cause IRL issues. Funeral prep. etc. Can't stream that much now as I have to prepare a lot of shit. Never die without a will. 
I'll prob make a separate video on what its like preparing for a funeral. Normally the person who died, did all of this. Anyway in regards to Saya

"Fake" A/S tier. She's a very good unit with wheel, but once you strip that away from here, her teams comps before very niche compared to prev anni units. There are many supports that do what she does better. If it weren't for the divine Caro Drawback, I wouldn't mind. Plus, 90% of you after watching this are beating her black and blue for her wheel to put on your teams. I also did testing for memes on putting her wheels on other comps just for the arith. Every single comp. Kath, bluwill, gelot, etc. Can perform better with it. None of you are actually gonna use Saya with her wheel, be honest. 

That is why I said "fake" a/s tier. If you are using her with the wheel. She's A tier min. Her BiS

Услышишь ли ты мой зов, когда тень растает в пустоте?
Отзовёшься ли на зов, имя в бездне шепча, лишь тебе?
Слышишь ли этот зов — сквозь песок, что уходит сквозь пальцы,
пусть забыта — но я всё ещё здесь.

Одуванчика пух, в течении одинок — меня уносит поток, и некуда мне.
Крылья, снежной листвой, извиваясь во мгле, чертят звёздный узор в темноте.
Лепестки в вышине — всё, что держим в руке, — капля чистой, истинной любви,
лишь она даст семени рост.
Слёзы знают, и пух — в этом мире внизу одинокий поиск, но тот звук не отпустит,

Осколки тишины вдохни — и чистый звук треснет, голос сорвётся.
Старые сны, память дней — гнилой сладостью кровь стынет в жилах.
Эхо спорит с огнём, сквозь разломы и щели, круша и сжимая в тиски —
лишь забыть и отпустить… но я знаю: прочувствовать — значит понять.

Как упавший листок, что уходит в путь, растворяясь в серой мгле,
Тени тают следом, исчезая в дымке, сбившись с пути.
video_title: 🎵 Morimens × Saya no Uta┊Theme Song - Song of Memento - Emi Evans Ver.

author: @ATrashKeeper
text:
A few clarifications: 
1. do i recommend this team? hell no, kath already works with other units and
there's no need to go through so many hoops just to make a meme comp work.
(Who can say if some actual good player can make this work though)

2. i did kinda misplay in my rotation, i could've used GRamona's skill to pull
Saya's 0 cost, guaranteeing a reshuffle and keeping my posse/kath exalt in case i was unlucky.

3. I just used W3 out of laziness but this is not the ideal boss for this comp.
Saya's soulforge increases corrosion value against caro enemies, you can probably stack so much more.
Alas it didn't matter, i didn't even trigger the full corrosion.

4. I did not have E3 yet when i did this, so again, corrosion value can go higher.

author: @divineclaypuppet7460
text:
20:23 Ok so to explain the Realms functions : 
- Chaos is mostly humans, but: they are the Researchers type, those that try to understand the world around them and all. Think of them as your protagonists in like Call of Cthulhu, where you're an investigator sometimes "blessed" or "cursed" by the Higher Beings (mostly cursed honestly). In Morimens, it's mostly people from Mythag University, the faction of the Protagonist. 
This Realm has Tawil, the incarnation of the God of Omniscience and Forbidden Knowledge from beyond the Gate of the Silver Key (inspired by Umr-at Tawil, an outer god who's an avatar of Yog-Sothoth)

- Aequor is the most recognisable "Cthulhu" faction: they are Lovecraftian people related to the water or the depths, coming from the Eternal Lemuria (Legally Distinct Rlyeh). 
This realm has Tulu, who's a twink with tentacles from his back who is obviously inspired by Cthulhu. He was the God-king of Lemuria.

- Caro is all the gothic, vampire, kinda body-transfiguration
video_title: Cthulhu Waifu Simulator [Pseychie Morimens]

Darkest Dungeon (I/II) is fun and the story looks good, but it's a long game demanding patience.

author: @ICE.AMERICANO
text:
라방 못봐서 다시보기 보는데 스팀리뷰 ㅋㅋ

1. 머피 스킨

오히려 이격 캐릭하고 기존 캐릭 스킨을 공유하는 게임 자체가 극소수
만약 된다고 해도 머피랑 탄피가 동일 편성 못하게 막았을 것
그리고 이게 문제가 되려면 머피 스킨 출시 직후에

탄피가 나옴으로 인해서 머피를 못쓰게 됐거나 아예 상위호환으로 나와서 머피를 죽여버렸거나
머피가 병신이 되서 파티에 안들어가게 됐거나 뭐 이중에 하나라도 있어야함

2. 공식 번역가

그림쟁이니 영어로만 말하니 러시아어 구사자네 뭐네 하지만 공식 번역가라는 사람이 디코에서 한 말은
한국어로 자기소개 하는 거 말곤 본 적이 없음 애초에 그 글 말고는 디코에 작성한 글 이력조차 없음
디스코드 소개말도 한국어로 적어둠

뭐 실제로 공식 번역가가 한국인 같지 않은 건 사실임 번역하는 거 보면

3. human translate
단순하게 저 영어 뜻 그대로 읽으면 그냥 인간 번역이다 AI 번역 아니다 표시인데
저게 꼬울 이유가 뭐가 있는지 모르겠음 

일반적으로 번역에는 '자원봉사자 기여 이름'을 써둠. 누가 했는지, 어느 범위를 했는지 기록을 함.
근데 이 파트만 포멀하게 '담당한 사람의 이름이 적혀있지 않음' 인 시점에서 의심을 안할수가 없음.

라고 하는데 기존 봉사자의 이름을 제외하고 공식 번역가 이름으로 갈아치운 것도 아니고
그 사람과 봉사자의 내용이 섞여 있어서 여러 사람의 이름을 적으면 난잡해지니 저렇게 표시 하는 것도 이상하지 않음
차라리 그 번역을 자신이 해서 자신의 이름이 빠진 게 서운하다면 이해 가능

4. 여러가지 문제라고 하지만 사실상 번역 문제 밖에 없음

5. 솔직히 공식 번역가의 실력이 좋냐 하면 아닌 건 사실이고
망각전야를 하는 사람의 최소 반 이상은 번역에 불만이 있는 건 사실이기 때문에 번역 가지고 욕하는 건 이상하지 않음
근데 너무 억까를 섞어서 말함 

무언가를 전달하거나 의견을 제시할 때 가장 안 좋은 방법이
이런 식으로  억까와 사실도 아닌 내용을 섞어서 이야기 하면서 자신의 말을 설득하
video_title: 망각전야Morimens) (대리뽑,상담시청가능) 1주일 영상을 안올리는 유루바가있다????

text:
Additional notes for map routing

-The route I drew was a suggestion. If you would feel better clearing the mist nodes instead of taking damage through them that is also fair. I simply prefer to just beeline red pools since it makes mob fights much easier once you have ~5k hp. 

-Heal points can also be used to heal instead of using them to rouse since rouses can be bought in the shop. Judge what you wish to do depending on how your health is looking after battles.

author: @kingflares2
text: In case you were wondering how he died. It was a variety of factors that can happen to anyone. Its brain aneurysm combined with severe triple vessel coronary something. It is pretty wild. I'll make a vid with more permission from relatives. His life was actually interesting. But of all things. This was the calmest death I've seen. I've been to 3 funerals, had people die. Even friends back then who offed themselves. This was one was no blood, no fear on the face, just sleeping. Like you'd have 0 clue he was dead. We just found him, 1-2hours of eating Bun Bo Hue (I can't type viet sorry) dead. After lying down for a nap due to a headache. He was the most fit uncle. Probably the strongest person in my US family. He carried logs at the refugee camps and was in a Boat people doc (in the background, we totally famous). I know he was the strongest, cause he would beat me and my cousins when we were fooling around when we were younger. He'd 1v4 us.
video_title: [Morimens] Spreadsheet Update Posse Tier List 2026 and what is meta/why. On stream review.

author: @Juan-c2c1f
text:
Primero, un saludo, y que bueno encontrar a alguien que hable de lo bien que encaja Morimems con Saya no UTA, si se siente que los desarrolladores le metieron mucha cabeza a su colaboración y al juego en si y eso me gusta mucho. 
En cuanto a Saya no UTA, para mi, lo mas interesante de Saya, es que el horror viene más que nada de la perspectiva,  y el mundo que desconocemos de las otras personas, como sucede con Fuminori, es un paciente clínico, que sufre y en un mundo que nosotros no podemos llegar a comprender por qué el no solo lo ve, lo siente, lo huele, lo vive, algo que nosotros no podemos. Y también me gusta, por que cuestiona un aspecto muy importante, y es que tan realmente estamos unidos las personas, que mundos no llegamos a comprender y las personas como Fuminori, a las que no se les comprende terminan siendo aisladas dejadas a tener una existencia miserable, teniendo que forzarse a adaptarse a vivir de esa manera con su condición mental por que sus amigos no quieren intenta
video_title: ¿Por qué Saya NO es una colaboración cualquiera? | Morimens y Saya no Uta comparten el mismo horror

author: @muyeong7342
text:
융재 4파 5파까지 해서 마지막 공략 영상입니다~
5파 설명할때 조금 부족한 부분이 있어서 추가로 부연설명을 해볼게요
사실 중독덱을 보자마자 아니 디버프 삭제 있는데 왜 중독덱함??? 이라고 하실수있으실거같아요
근데 저는 사실 디버프삭제 기믹보다 저 약탈 기믹을 조금 더 자세히 봤어요
제가 사용한 1파~5파까지 모든 딜러는 보존을 사용합니다 그 중 하나라도 먹혔을때 오는 데미지가 훨씬 크다고 생각을했고
그리고 보스가 공격하는 데미지를 보시면 아시겠지만 거진 평균 1천 정도의 데미지를 부여합니다 
이정도의 데미지를 버티면서 약탈기믹을 파훼 할수있는 덱으로 저는 중독덱을 선택했어요
확실히 디버프 삭제 기믹은 어렵지만 빠르게 잡는다면 융돌의 광기가 그렇게 높아지는게 아니기에 다시 쌓는게 그렇게 어렵지도 않구요
이러한 내용들이 부족한거 같아서 추가로 적어 봤어요~~
다음 영상으로 보고싶거나 알고싶으신거 있다면 댓글로 알려주세요~!!!

text: Soo shes a really good support for those who hit a lot or do big hits cause corruption almost triples the damage they cause.. not so much with poison decks sinde its only half as effective on statuses. Her ult is more about setting up 1 shot combos and is imo too expensive you can ho estly use her at e0

text:
Aca dejo un comentario largo pero me alegraría mucho que lo leyeras entero lo dejaré editado para copiar lo que deje en las respuestas, por que no me dejaba comentar:
Un vídeo de Morimems con Saya no UTA, por fin mas vídeos del juego, por favor, pido un vídeo acerca del cap 1 que fue demasiado bueno, y un análisis de Aigis como personaje, saludos

Edit: yo también entre por la colaboración de saya pero me quedé por la historia
Lo que más me gustó de saya no UTA, es que te hace cuestionar cuan realmente estamos los seres humanos unidos, que si realmente somos capaces de comprendernos y dar el amor y sobre todo preparado para recibir un amor tan grande como el de amar algo desde una situación tan mala como fuminori, de una real comprensión y entendimiento de la gente para trata a personas enfermas como este, y  como la falta de empatía, termina alejando a esas personas enfermas, aislando las y dejándole siempre destinos oscuros e inciertos por la falta de amor a estas, ponle que si fumin
video_title: 🤯 This Saya no Uta collab is insane

text:
Lyrics cho bạn nào muốn tiện theo dõi ạ

Liệu người nghe được em, khi hình bóng của em giờ đây đã phai?
Liệu người nghe được em, khi giọng ca của em giờ đây vỡ tan?
Liệu người nghe được em, khi bàn tay của em giờ đây đã rụng rời?
Dù người chẳng còn nhớ, em vẫn ở đây

Bồ công anh bay đến, một mình mang thương mến
Quện lên trên đôi má đã đỏ hoen lệ
Bồ công anh phiêu tán, nhẹ nhàng vương trên trán
Tựa như ngôi sao sáng giữa đêm mưa giông
Bồ công anh nhảy múa, dù thân đang héo úa, hùa theo vang ngân gió
Chỉ có trong thâm tâm, mầm ái vùi sâu đậm
Bồ công anh nghe thấy, giọt mưa rơi nơi đấy
Dậy nơi trời mây gió vẫn có một tình yêu
Liệu anh…

Tựa như những lời ca, những âm vọng xa vẫn đang vấn vương nơi nào
Nghẹn ngào trong lời mơ, những ký ức thơ, chìm trong bóng đêm phai mờ
Vậy mà vẫn còn đây, từ nơi đáy con tim, còn day dứt mối nhân duyên
Hàn huyên có chăng hư vọng? Dù trong tâm trí cất lên

Vạn bông hao tươi mát ngát hương thơm tựa như trời cao mãi trong lành
Dành cho anh mong ước mãi khôn

author: @muyeong7342
text:
상시캐 공략 영상으로 돌아온 박현입니다
(한정 캐릭터 티어표도 준비중에 있습니다)
일단 영상내 에서 제가 언급을 잘못한 캐릭터들이 좀 있더라구요
캐릭터 이름을 헷갈린다거나 그런 식으로요.......일단 자막이라도 다시 수정해놓기는 했는데...... 죄송합니다.....
일단 이영상 내 티어표에 대해서 정리하자면 초반 보다 융재를 조금 더 집중해서 만들긴 했어요 아무래도 재화가 부족한 상황에서 이것저것 키우는것 보다 미래가 있는 그런캐릭터를 키우는게 가장좋을거같다고 생각했거든요
그리고 제가 추후에 올릴 상시 4인팟 조합역시 현재 영상 준비중입니다 여기서 조금 더 뉴비분들이 쓰실수 있는 그런 조합들의 대해서 설명할거같아요
영상내 티어표는 저의 주관이 100% 반영된것이기 때문에 여러분의 의견과 조금의 차이점은 있을수 있을거라고 생각합니다

그래도 제 나름대로 생각해 보고 사용해봤을때 느낀 점들을 설명 드린것이니 재미로 봐주셨으면 좋겠습니다!!!
좋아요 댓글 구독 한번씩 부탁드리며 저는 다음 영상 상시캐릭 추천 조합 영상으로 돌아오도록하겠습니다
부족하지만 시청해 주시는 모든 분들께 다시한번 감사드립니다!!!!

author: @codyivvel1728
text:
The thing is about D-tide... there is no turn count in it. So one turn kills with Pollux or Mouchette aren't that necessary.

They'll shine in say hard mode story where you do have a turn count. But even then, most mid-turn dps work just fine there.

Ultimately, it's still personal choice if you want to take the extra turns to set up or go guns blazing.

author: @PolarDon
text:
despite the fact that he can do a lot of damage. I don't think that he is any good as a dps
1) 150 base aliemus, needs OE to function and ult generation worse than Arachne.
2) Team. Who exactly are we using to skyrocket str/tentacle str for him, especially when every other good str stacker is in either Vortice team or/and gMurphy team
3) He becomes worthless the moment there is a boss that spawns minions due to ult targeting(like in current wave 3)

I think he is, in fact, support. Mainly due to gaunts having a 1,5/2,5 ratio of being dps/support oriented( or like 0,5 to 2.5 is his x card is not a gaunt)

Also why the fuck is he a crit dmg scaling character? his crit scalings are ass, he himself has no iterest in Cdmg as his x card is kinda ass, the only point is to make tentacle crit damage better, witch is better done by one of his gaunts

text:
After reviewing his kit, I don't think it make sense for his posse to draw gaunt cards. Beside the 2c that generates them in your HAND once per battle, you can only get gaunt cards from his Exalt with the condition that it kills an unit. How often are we Exalting with him? So I think gaining +1 Pack Hunt is good, that's essentially 1 extra gaunt card

EDIT: Okay, I see why the need for draw posse if you have 6 Perm Gaunt cards in the deck, but at E3, 3 of his 4 cards can draw gaunt.

author: @blumstein3468
text:
Still in the middle of digesting the video's breakdown of Pontus' kit. I learned a lot more than I expected, in particular with the scaling and additive/multiplicative interactions of his Strength Down from Enlightens, Wheels, etc.

I was also struck by the statement that Morimens is a 'maths' game; I'm so used to gachas being "level up, kit out, watch big numbers" games that actively diving deep into the Awakeners' kit and even the enemies' stats are difficult for me to adopt. Not impossible, but some part of me still resists to do so and I waste half an hour or so of effort because I brought Vortice into a cat fight that seals other Awakeners' Exalt after the first one uses theirs. It's growing pains, but I hope I do learn - correctly - from these experiences, not just in-game but also outside of it.

As an Awakener pre-release review video, this has both my thumbs-up. Exhaustive analysis, concise explanations, and very appreciated blurbs about in-game trends on mechanics and Awakene
video_title: A Scarily Lengthy Analysis of Pontos in Morimens

author: @karaboutsleepy
text: A little niche thing I found with Tulu's 4 cost card is that when used on an enemy with Barrier it deletes all barrier stacks while still doing damage. And no, I don't mean the amount of tentacles you get can delete all of the stacks of barrier. No. I mean the single green eye beam attack can delete all stacks of barrier while still doing piercing damage and then the tentacles come right after. Pretty niche and pretty useful!

author: @SleepyGuppy
text:
He's one of the most interesting characters in terms of how his kit age, given that he's the first limited unit in the game, with him being regarded as of the most debated on how relevant he his in end game (besides his OE).

With the launch of GMurphy and Lemurian buffs, he's gone up as one of the core units of the team, if only 2rd best of the old Lemurians to Miryam.

One thing of how OE works is that it makes Tentacles actually attack 3 times, not 2, as the effect should be "Command all Tentacles to attack once at turn end." for it to count as 2 times of turn end Tentacles attacks, not 3.
video_title: Tulu: The Bored King #morimens

text:
I didn't use Tulu for my first 350 a few days ago--my account was 36 days old at that point. Aside from a lack of resources I couldn't make sense of his kit. I just tried him out yesterday against the Catto and he surprised me with how strong he is!

It kind of scares me how THIS guy is now considered a sub-dps to GMurphy, 'cause it's ridiculous to have your Assault play second fiddle to the Chorus unit in your team. But I can see how it happened with the damage difference and how his cards enhance the tentacles. I keep resetting from my inexperience with the whole Divine Aequor/Sacrifice thing going on, though, so I'll just leave Tulu for my Arc 1 Hard Corpita team for now...

Thanks for the Tulu guide! Your explanation of the mechanics are very digestible. I look forward to your version of explaining Tawil and 24, as their kits have more nuance than their skill descriptions show.
video_title: Tulu: The Bored King #morimens

author: @Alessiel
text:
Forgot to talk much about Covenants in the video. Pontos doesn't have a direct "best in slot" Covenant, so run whatever set your team needs. If it's a death res team, run Burial Grounds. If they struggle with draw power but have good arithmetica already, possibly run Twisted Twins White or even Black (with Pontos E3!). If you don't need either of those, Deus Ex Machina will be good. Unstained Chronicle could also *maybe* help with defensive momentum if you're using Posses frequently. Also remember Crit Rate does not benefit Pontos at all.

Substats: CDMG > DRes > RM > Keyflare > Others

I didn't really say this very clearly when I was speaking - one of the reasons I expect Pontos will require more Keyflare support than usual and you should often prioritize it is because when you spend Arithmetica on "Buff" type cards (Pontos Gaunts), this doesn't give you any Keyflare at all. So essentially the more arith you spend on Gaunts, the less Keyflare you generate than usual, so you'll need
video_title: A Succinct Breakdown of Pontos in Morimens

author: @Xovian
text:
Dam it Jim!
Gonna make me play it again. 
I've been gone for about 4 (maybe even 6) months give or take.

Though i would say you missed one important thing. Morimens is about building teams, this is especially true once you hit the second Arc. While getting a good unit will help an account in the long run, it wont necessarily give you progression if you don't have some good synergies to go with them. Wheels can make or break a team in the end game, so knowing what you plan to aim is a huge boon. And if ya dont have a plan, get one! Whether you toil it yourself or get a reliable plan for units/wheels from other players recommendations, but have one and try to see it through! It will save you in the long term. May not open every door in the game for you, but having at least one fully competitive deck can help a ton.

Still i'd say overall: Good vid.  Think you covered the basics for pretty much everything, and even though i know the game, some of the names (like keyflare) are still so un

Hopefully, more coverage on Morimens will attract more players that gel with its vibe and difficulty. author: @thebluestlime58
text:
good guide so far, just really need to address the point about "selling low-value Strikes and Defenses", because you can actively brick your run if you're not careful

Strike and Defense cards are among the primary sources of Aliemus (Ult gauge) for a character, and also, some characters (especially newer ones) have mechanics directly tied to those cards (e.g. Arachne's Strike/Defense cards, when paired with her signature relic, allow her to trigger her follow-up attacks for free, and those normally take some time and effort to get access to)

author: @deyzunasbunker
text: Do not worry about meta units from the beginning, it's gonna take TIME until meta is slightly relevant. People have beat the hardest shit in the game with soft cap starter characters (soft cap is lv 60 and max is lv 90, which is really hard to reach), so even though the game is difficult, it has leeway for skill enough that whatever you do will work out. I looked around a lot when I started to see which units I should avoid and they are VERY few. Tier lists are shitty because some C/D tier characters are super strong picks in specific teams, so just go at it man...

author: @loumiesterr
text: I enjoy how you pointed out the intimacy, urgency, and beautiful lyrics within the song, although I haven't played Morimens, Saya no Uta is one of my all time favorite vn's. Saya no Uta first and foremost is a twisted love story, it's a story about how far two individuals will go into depravity to stay with one another. It's insanely beautiful (and has an AMAZING OST of it's own, you should def check it out sometime) and often people forget how raw and emotional the story is underneath all the horror aspects. The two main characters will do anything to be together, even if it changes the whole world around them, or even themselves, to unrecognizable levels.

author: @dux6477
text:
When you posted that you were giving Morimens a chance, I was already expecting a video from you about the music. 

You've probably noticed that the game's soundtrack relies heavily on its leitmotifs, and this song uses two of them. That repetitive piano section is the "memento" leitmotif, the most prevalent throughout the game and its defining characteristic. The fact that they used it in this collab and that it fits perfectly reflects, for me, Morimens' true intention: to preserve everything against Dissolution. 

I have no doubt you'll react to Emi's other song from the game, but if you're still playing, I recommend finishing chapter 9 of the main story so it hits you harder.

Thanks for giving one of my favorite games a chance, and I'm glad you enjoyed it.
video_title: This Gacha Game Has Shockingly Good Music  Ft. Emi Evans

author: @thpdom
text:
Thank you for the video Marco. 
One oif my favorite elements of this games osts, is it's incessant use of leitmotifs per each chapter. It would be a blast to see you pick a random chapters ost and go through it. Or just a collection of tracks selected by a community member. This game does in general deserve way more attention then it's getting.

author: @kingflares2
text: This is just every story mode team. Remember, Story mode means best wheels/units. The other teams I showed in prior videos are lesser. Also did a wheel less run on stream earlier. I go over what is needed. What synergizes, etc. Its pretty easy to figure out what works and what doesn't. You don't want to interfere with his gaunts recycling. Only thing I did not note is that if you are running corpo, put dreams on her, a crit dmg cov on pontos. I use Castor's Steppenwolf atm. I'll post the last of my e3, non whale pontos clears later from the stream. As I recently just got him +12, since he's pretty strong.

author: @ATrashKeeper
text:
A few things to add as always:

- There is now an in game timeline for all of the sidestories, which can definitely be helpful in figuring out when to play something.
I probably won't play all of them and some i think i'll do out of order because i think it would be more impactful.

-This video has been in editing hell for a while, it was originally planned near the beginning of 2025.
And this is not even counting the fact that i had to put on hold Ultra Only Chapter 3. 
Long story short, i decided to redesign the script halfway through, it was originally going in a direction that was,  in my opinion,
 a bit too time consuming for what the result would've been.
Hopefully this will not be a recurring problem in the future.

-This is technically part of the "Ultra Only" series, but i felt like calling the video "Ultra Only Side Stories" wouldn't have been the best idea,
as none of the stories i retold were about ultra awakeners.
Still, the account is the same and you can see me respectin
video_title: The knight and the queen (of bath water) | Morimens Side stories

author: @Grimalkyna
text:
Plot twist: Wonderstop si evolve in un horror ove il tizio pacioso è uno psicopatico omicida e spaccia roba strana nel tè e tu ne diventi inconsapevole complice.

Povera Yumia XD

In realtà se volessero nerfare potrebbero farlo, la gente si lamenterebbe? Certo che sì ma in altri giochi lo hanno fatto indi improbabile ma non impossibile, poi i devs di morimens mi paiono brave e sensate persone indi dubito faranno gli antipatici, per il resto ci sta che rilascino gradualmente personaggi anche più cicciosi e succulenti, alla fine il rooster si deve rinnovare e loro debbono campare dato che non si mangia con le speranze e le buone intenzioni XD
video_title: Wanderstop, Gothic Remake, Atelier Yumia (Switch 2 q.q), Pokémon Champions, Morimens

author: @vetreas366
text:
Morimens is a great game. Never seen so many orphans maimed, tortured, dosfigurated or murdered in any other game. And it does this while somehow still invoking some level of hope against the despair.

This the kind of game that doesn't just trick you into thinking a kind lady is an evil abuser as a red herring, it makes you confront her at which point, unable to withstand the guilt of not being able to protect her charges, her head explodes and she becomes a boss fight. She survives fhe head explosion and has to love like that for the rest of her life too. Fun stuff. 

If there was a door made of punches that said "Pull" this game would be permanently stopped at the entrance due to sheer stubborn refusal.

I never played the Saya VN, though I had intentions a decade and half back. Found out about this collab from a random algorithm pull and the CC mentioned more about Morimens which got me to try it. No regrets. An ansolute gem. It's like an even bleaker and gripping Reverse 1999, tho
video_title: This Gacha Game Has Shockingly Good Music  Ft. Emi Evans

author: @kowalski2385
text: Marco, I trust you've done enough research which will prevent you from personally* investigating  the original visual novel. I myself had heard the name here and there though only in mention. I knew VNs were a strange world full of messed up media. Though, even second hand- I was not prepared for the "cognito-hazard" that is Saya no Uta. So, as a formal warning- do not personally investigate even the censored version of the VN. For it is simultaneously reviled, yet respected...the medium in itself violates the individual almost breaking the 4th wall in a sense. Not in narrative, but in purpose and experience of the very existence of it. YOU, experience a horror, YOU yourself are irrevocably affected by the story, by the game.

author: @AIcon1442
text: Alright, inspired by the music, I played the original *Song of Saya*. And I have a few... questions. Isaac, did you actually create two parts for your tracks because the original game also features two tracks titled "Song of Saya"—and because your songs share a similar mood with the original? The first part also struck me as quite a departure, given that you haven't released any instrumental tracks lately... Seriously? I’m simultaneously impressed and even slightly indignant at how I was led on.
video_title: Morimens - Saya II

author: @cosmiikat-wav
text:
I know fuck and all about Morimens but that is not stopping me from ADORING THIS BANGER OH MY GODDDDDDDD.

Its simple, but it really works with it, the repeating "me" really hits the idea of desperately wishing to be remembered, that theyre hoping dearly for that request to be made.

The themes of spring combined with the idea of rotting flesh, crawling around inside her...her ideals rotting away and invading her very body? Contorting and twisting and snapping, as it becomes an amalgam of her...but not quite her, anymore? Im not so sure about this one.

Its a really pretty song, I dont think ive heard anything quite like it, but all music from this channel scratches the itch I have quite well, whatever it is, I very much enjoy it, this song sates a thirst indeed. 

Until next time I pop into a comments section for niche artists, ahah....
video_title: Morimens - Saya II
